title: 2 Pack Dinosaur Coverall Feeding Bibs by Jump Baby. Suitable for Babies and Toddlers Aged 6 Months to 2 Years.
features: KEEPING CLEAN - these bibs will cover up your baby to avoid getting mess where it is not welcome!
STAIN RESISTANT - the coating on the bibs repels all the worst stains, keeping your bib looking new even when it's not.
MACHINE WASHABLE - for ease, practicality and hygiene you can pop our bibs straight in the washing machine to keep them clean and fresh
COMFORTABLE - soft cuffs and a flexible well fitting body
SAFE - tested to EU standards with reassurance of no BPA or Pthalates. Non toxic to your little one.
description: Pack of 2 hugely practical and very stylish coverall feeding bibs for your dinosaur fanatic. With a reversible food catcher pocket, elasticated wrists and a neat hook and loop fastener at the back. We've also thrown in a matching travel bag - somewhere to stash your dirty bib when you're out and about. Perfect from weaning onwards. Tested and recommended by babies.
